free_text: Levels of 16O near 13 MeV excitation from 15N+p
Melamine deposited on 0.15 cm thick Cu backing.
Two targets (6 and 68 keV thick at 898 keV resonance).
For 15N(p,a0) measurement, 45 deg to beam direction,
and the thickness is about 20 keV.
12.7 cm x 10.2 cm, mounted on a rotating table at
a distance of 33 cm from the target.
A second detector at 120 deg used to monitor 4.43 MeV
3 detectors in a 23 cm diameter scattering chamber.
1 additional detector to monitor the yield.
Incident energies (EN) are corrected for target
cos**2(theta) which was converted to theta (ANG)
